title: 🌑 Myth Entropy Feedback
name: Myth Entropy Feedback
what_it_is: When a myth system begins to destabilize from within—narrative components feeding entropy back into their source, collapsing the story from the inside.
how_to_use: his tale decays as it unfolds—each telling accelerating myth entropy
she walks inside a collapsing story—belief unraveling as recursion loops fail
animation_behavior: Scenes de-resolve, loops glitch mid-story, characters forget their roles as entropy rises ---
